summary: Completed comprehensive testing of MO Deal Wholesaler platform. Backend APIs working excellently (80% success rate) with all core functionality operational. Critical frontend JavaScript errors preventing proper navigation after user registration.

minor_issues.impact: Expected behavior - admin access control working correctly

ui_bugs.issue: Select.Item components have value prop errors causing runtime crashes
ui_bugs.error_details: A <Select.Item /> must have a value prop that is not an empty string

ui_bugs.issue: App crashes with JavaScript errors preventing navigation to Properties/Payments pages

integration_issues.issue: Registration completes successfully but subsequent page navigation fails due to JS errors

issues: React Hook useEffect missing dependencies across multiple pages

passed_tests: Frontend registration submission and redirect to dashboard

success_percentage.frontend: 60% (6/10 tests passed due to JS errors)

action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix Select component value prop errors in RegisterPage.js and other components. The Select.Item components need proper value props to prevent runtime crashes. Also fix React Hook useEffect dependency warnings across multiple pages. These JavaScript errors prevent users from navigating after registration.
